metadata.title: Souk ElKanto · Madinaty Neighbor-to-Neighbor Marketplace
metadata.description: Your nearest deal. A neighbor-to-neighbor marketplace for Madinaty residents.

hero.title: Your Nearest Deal
hero.subtitle: A neighbor-to-neighbor marketplace for Madinaty. Safe, trusted, simple.

home.trustBanner: ✓ Verified Madinaty residents  ·  Safe meet spots  ·  Token holds
home.aboutNeighborsBody: Every seller and buyer is verified. You know who you're talking to: your neighbor, not a faceless account.
home.aboutBrokerBody: No money moves through the platform. Post, offer, meet. The deal stays between you and your neighbor.
home.aboutWhatsAppBody: Share any listing to WhatsApp with one tap. Communicate the way you already do.
home.heritageBody: The name 'ElKanto' is drawn from the original Souk ElKanto in Port Said — a traditional market that rose in the late 19th century with the opening of the Suez Canal. It was a bustling hub for trading goods from passing ships, and became an iconic symbol of Port Said's heritage. Souk ElKanto digital revives that spirit: trade between neighbors, trust before profit.

search.noResultsTitle: We couldn't find anything like that
search.noResultsBody: We searched for "{query}" and didn't find any matching listings. If you'd like, we can notify you when something similar gets posted.
search.notifyMe: Notify me when something similar is listed
search.notifySuccess: Done! We'll keep an eye out for you.

offer.notePlaceholder: e.g. Happy to negotiate, just need to see it first...
offer.tokenHoldHint: Tokens are not money. An internal hold released after handover.
offer.sentBody: The seller will review your offer and get back to you. Get ready to negotiate.
offer.ownListing: You can't make an offer on your own listing.

offers.emptyHint: When you send or receive offers, they will appear here.

create.title: List an Item
create.photoDrop: Drag & drop photos here, or click to browse (optional · 1–8 photos)
create.placeholderDescription: Describe the condition, age, reason for selling...
create.defaultDescription: Short description of the listed item.
create.publishSuccessBody: Your listing is now visible to all your neighbors.
create.loginRequired: You need to log in to publish a listing
create.errorTitle: Title must be at least 3 characters.
create.errorDescription: Description must be at least 10 characters.
create.errorPrice: Enter a price greater than zero.
create.errorPublish: Couldn't publish the listing. Please try again.
create.completeProfileBody: Full name, gender, and birthdate (18+) are required to make offers.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.networkDown: We can't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
errors.beFirst: Be the first to list something. Your souk is waiting!

overview.verifyNudge: Verify your account to build more trust with buyers and sellers
overview.noActivity: Nothing happening yet. Post a listing or make an offer.

listings.title: My listings
listings.empty: No listings yet. Post your first.

offers.title: Offers
offers.actionError: Couldn't complete the action. Try again.

handovers.title: Handovers
handovers.empty: Your active handovers will appear here.

favorites.title: Saved listings
favorites.empty: Nothing saved yet. Tap the heart on any listing to save it.

wallet.title: Your wallet
wallet.noBalance: Wallet empty. Tokens are commitment holds, not money; they appear automatically with offer holds.
wallet.soon: Coming soon: transaction history and live holds.

trustMeter.title: Trust meter
trustMeter.soon: Coming soon: full progress bar and the activity ledger.

profile.title: Profile
profile.dealNote: Complete your profile to make and accept offers. KYC is optional for deals under 5,000 EGP.

verify.title: Identity verification
verify.subtitle: We ask for this to protect the community and build trust between buyers and sellers.
verify.dropHint: Drop your ID card photo here
verify.orClick: or click to choose from device
verify.successBody: Our review team will get back to you within 24 hours.
verify.errorId: Please enter a valid national ID.
verify.errorDocument: Please upload your ID card photo.

auth.loginTitle: Welcome, sign in with your phone
auth.loginSubtitle: We'll send a code to confirm your number. No passwords, no fuss.
auth.errorWrongCode: Wrong code, or it has expired.
auth.errorTooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Wait a moment and try again.
